Name: (Name)
Comment: (Comment)

Name: MAX_BATCH_HISTORY
Comment: Batch history circular buffer size.

Name: Phase
Comment: State machine phase.

Name: StartPB
Comment: Start pushbutton input.

Name: ProcessCompleteFlag
Comment: Indicates batch has completed and is waiting for operator release.

Name: BatchID
Comment: Current batch number.

Name: TargetTemp
Comment: Target temperature setpoint selected from active recipe.

Name: TargetLevel
Comment: Target vessel level setpoint selected from active recipe.

Name: TT_Temp
Comment: Simulated temperature transmitter measurement.

Name: LT_Level
Comment: Simulated level transmitter measurement.

Name: HeaterCmd
Comment: Command to run heater.

Name: ProcessInletValveCmd
Comment: Command to open process inlet valve.

Name: ProductOutletValveCmd
Comment: Command to open product outlet valve.

Name: MixerCmd
Comment: Command to run mixer motor.

Name: PID_Error
Comment: PID error.

Name: PID_Output
Comment: PID output.

Name: PID_Kp
Comment: PID proportional gain.

Name: PID_Ki
Comment: PID integral gain.

Name: PID_Integral
Comment: PID integral accumulator.

Name: RT_StartTime
Comment: System time when batch started.

Name: RT_EndTime
Comment: System time when batch ended.

Name: RT_MaxTemp
Comment: Maximum temperature recorded during batch.

Name: RT_AlarmOccurred
Comment: Indicates that at least one alarm or fault occurred during batch.

Name: RT_MixTimeAccum
Comment: Actual accumulated mix time during mixing phase of batch.

Name: BatchTime
Comment: Simulated elapsed batch time counter used for duration tracking, hold timing, and fault timing.

Name: HighTempAlarm
Comment: Latched high temperature alarm triggered when vessel temperature exceeds recipe target temperature by 5 °C.

Name: HighLevelAlarm
Comment: Latched high level alarm triggered when vessel level exceeds 95 % of maximum capacity.

Name: GeneralFault
Comment: General fault indicator.

Name: HistoryIndex
Comment: Batch history circular buffer index.

Name: BH_BatchID
Comment: Batch ID, stored in batch history buffer.

Name: BH_StartTime
Comment: Batch start time, stored in batch history buffer.

Name: BH_EndTime
Comment: Batch end time, stored in batch history buffer.

Name: BH_TargetTemp
Comment: Recipe target temperature, stored in batch history buffer.

Name: BH_TargetLevel
Comment: Recipe target level, stored in batch history buffer.

Name: BH_SetMixTime
Comment: Recipe set mix time during mixing phase, stored in batch history buffer.

Name: BH_MaxTemp
Comment: Maximum temperature recorded during batch, stored in batch history buffer.

Name: BH_ActualMixTime
Comment: Actual mix time during mixing phase, stored in batch history buffer.

Name: BH_AlarmOccurred
Comment: Indicates that at least one alarm or fault occurred during batch, stored in batch history buffer.

Name: ResetPB
Comment: Reset pushbutton input.

Name: VesselClean
Comment: Indicates vessel has completed CIP and is validated as clean.

Name: CIP_Timer
Comment: Accumulates CIP circulation time.

Name: CIPTime
Comment: Total amount of CIP circulation time to accumulate.

Name: CIP_FillLevel
Comment: Target vessel level for CIP circulation stage.

Name: HeaterPower
Comment: PID controller output representing heater power as a percentage (0-100 %) of maximum heating capacity.

Name: ScanTime
Comment: PLC program scan time used for PID controller calculations.

Name: PreviousPhase
Comment: Previous state machine phase.

Name: ResumePB
Comment: Resume pushbutton input.

Name: HoldPB
Comment: Pause pushbutton input.

Name: MaxHoldTime
Comment: Maximum time process can be paused before having to discard batch.

Name: ProductValid
Comment: Indicates whether batch product remains valid or must be discarded due to faults or process interruptions.

Name: RT_BatchArchived
Comment: Indicates that batch was archived.

Name: RT_TerminateRequest
Comment: Indicates that batch was terminated and is to be archived.

Name: ReleasePB
Comment: Release pushbutton input.

Name: BATCH_NONE
Comment: Indicates that a result was not attributed to batch yet.

Name: BATCH_SUCCESS
Comment: Indicates that a batch was successful.

Name: BATCH_ABORTED
Comment: Indicates that a batch was aborted.

Name: BATCH_DISCARDED_HOLD_TIMEOUT
Comment: Indicates that a batch was discarded due to excessive hold duration.

Name: BATCH_INTERNAL_FAULT
Comment: Indicates that a batch failed due an instrumental fault.

Name: RT_Result
Comment: Final outcome of batch.

Name: BH_Result
Comment: Final outcome of batch, stored in batch history buffer.

Name: AbortPB
Comment: Abort pushbutton input.

Name: EstopPB
Comment: Emergency stop pushbutton input.

Name: BH_LastPhase
Comment: Last phase active process went through, stored in batch history buffer.

Name: HoldTimeoutAlarm
Comment: Latched hold timeout alarm triggered when accumulated hold duration exceeds maximum allowable hold time and batch must be discarded.

Name: BATCH_ABORTED_ESTOP
Comment: Indicates that a batch was aborted due to emergency stop.

Name: NextPhase
Comment: Next state machine phase.

Name: StartPermissive
Comment: Indicates whether conditions are satisfied to allow batch process to start.

Name: MaxFaultRecoveryTime
Comment: Maximum duration a minor fault condition may persist before batch is discarded.

Name: Recipe_TargetLevel
Comment: Target vessel level defined by recipe that filling phase must reach before proceeding.

Name: Recipe_MixTime
Comment: Mix time defined by recipe that mixing phase must perform before proceeding.

Name: SelectedRecipe
Comment: Index of recipe selected by operator for next batch.

Name: Recipe_Name
Comment: Descriptive names of available recipes displayed on HMI.

Name: HighHighTempAlarm
Comment: Latched high-high temperature alarm triggered when vessel temperature exceeds recipe target temperature by 10 °C.

Name: LowLevelAlarm
Comment: Latched low level alarm triggered when vessel level is below 10 % of maximum capacity during heating or mixing phases.

Name: HighTempActive
Comment: High temperature alarm condition. True when vessel temperature exceeds recipe target temperature by 5 °C.

Name: HighHighTempActive
Comment: High-high temperature alarm condition. True when vessel temperature exceeds recipe target temperature by 10 °C.

Name: LowLevelActive
Comment: Low level alarm condition. True when vessel level is below 10 % of maximum capacity during heating or mixing phases.

Name: HighLevelActive
Comment: High level alarm condition. True when vessel level exceeds 95 % of maximum capacity.

Name: HighTempAck
Comment: Operator acknowledgment used to clear high temperature alarm.

Name: HighHighTempAck
Comment: Operator acknowledgment used to clear high-high temperature alarm.

Name: LowLevelAck
Comment: Operator acknowledgment used to clear low level alarm.

Name: HighLevelAck
Comment: Operator acknowledgment used to clear high level alarm.

Name: Recipe_TargetTemp
Comment: Target temperature defined by recipe that heating phase must reach before proceeding.

Name: RT_FillEndLevel
Comment: Actual level when filling phase finished.

Name: RT_HeatEndTemp
Comment: Temperature when heating phase finished.

Name: RT_AlarmCount
Comment: Total number of alarms triggered during batch.

Name: BH_FillEndLevel
Comment: Actual level when filling phase finished, stored in batch history buffer.

Name: BH_HeatEndTemp
Comment: Temperature when heating phase finished, stored in batch history buffer.

Name: BH_AlarmCount
Comment: Total number of alarms triggered during batch, stored in batch history buffer.

Name: BH_HoldDuration
Comment: Total duration of accumulated hold time during batch, stored in batch history buffer.

Name: RT_CIPCompleted
Comment: Indicates that the CIP circulation time requirement was met.

Name: BH_CIPCompleted
Comment: Indicates that the CIP circulation time requirement was met, stored in batch history buffer.

Name: InternalFault
Comment: Fault condition indicating instrument or measurement failure.

Name: BH_RecipeID
Comment: Index of selected recipe for batch, stored in batch history buffer.

Name: BATCH_ABORTED_HIGHHIGHTEMP
Comment: Indicates that a batch was aborted due to high-high temperature condition.

Name: MixTime
Comment: Mix time selected from active recipe.

Name: MinorFaultAlarms
Comment: Indicates that one or more minor alarms (high temperature, low temperature, high level or low level) are latched.

Name: CriticalFault
Comment: Indicates that high-high temperature alarm is latched or that internal fault is active.

Name: MinorFaultDelta
Comment: Current accumulation segment of minor fault duration to be added to total accumulation.

Name: MinorFaultAccum
Comment: Total accumulation of minor fault duration during batch.

Name: MinorFaultStartTime
Comment: Start time of current segment of minor fault timer.

Name: MinorFault
Comment: Indicates that one or more minor fault conditions are active.

Name: MinorFaultPrev
Comment: Indicator that a minor fault duration accumulation segment was initiated.

Name: BH_MinorFaultTime
Comment: Total accumulation of minor fault duration during batch, stored in batch history buffer.

Name: HoldStartTime
Comment: Start time of current segment of hold timer.

Name: HoldAccum
Comment: Total accumulation of hold duration during batch.

Name: HoldPrev
Comment: Indicator that a hold timer accumulation segment was initiated.

Name: HoldDelta
Comment: Current accumulation segment of hold timer to be added to total accumulation.

Name: SystemTime
Comment: Simulated system clock.

Name: HoldTimeoutAck
Comment: Operator acknowledgment used to clear hold timeout alarm.

Name: EstopResetPB
Comment: Emergency stop reset pushbutton input. Used to clear from emergency stop phase.

Name: RT_CIPMaxTemp
Comment: Max temperature reached during CIP.

Name: BH_CIPMaxTemp
Comment: Max temperature reached during CIP, stored in batch history buffer.

Name: BH_BatchDuration
Comment: Total time it took for batch to complete active phases, stored in batch history buffer.

Name: RT_BatchDuration
Comment: Total time it took for batch to complete active phases.

Name: LowTempActive
Comment: Low temperature alarm condition. True when temperature is more than 5 °C below recipe target temperature during mixing phase.

Name: LowTempAlarm
Comment: Latched low temperature alarm triggered when temperature is more than 5 °C below recipe target temperature during mixing phase.

Name: LowTempAck
Comment: Operator acknowledgment used to clear low temperature alarm.

Name: FaultTimeoutAlarm
Comment: Latched minor fault timeout alarm triggered when accumulated minor fault duration exceeds allowed limit during batch.

Name: FaultTimeoutAck
Comment: Operator acknowledgment used to clear minor fault timeout alarm.

Name: BATCH_DISCARDED_FAULT_TIMEOUT
Comment: Indicates that a batch was discarded due to excessive fault duration.

Name: RT_LastPhase
Comment: Last phase active process went through.

Name: InternalFaultAlarm
Comment: Latched internal fault alarm triggered when there is an instrument or measurement failure.

Name: InternalFaultAck
Comment: Operator acknowledgment used to clear internal fault alarm.

Name: CIPInletValveCmd
Comment: Command to open CIP inlet valve.

Name: WasteOutletValveCmd
Comment: Command to open waste outlet valve.
